title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You hear a woman talking about a new neighbour.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: A new neighbour moved into the flat upstairs last week. I was worried because the last person played music late at night. This neighbour has a dog, but it hardly barks. || Speaker: [8]What I really appreciate is that she introduced herself and gave me her phone number in case there are any problems[/8]. That made me feel much more relaxed. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: A new neighbour moved into the flat upstairs last week. I was worried because the last person played music late at night. This neighbour has a dog, but it hardly barks.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: What I really appreciate is that she introduced herself and gave me her phone number in case there are any problems. That made me feel much more relaxed. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

questions.question: What does the woman appreciate about her new neighbour?
questions.explanation: The woman appreciates that the neighbour introduced herself and gave her phone number in case of problems.

extracts.context: You hear two friends talking about a running race.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the race on Sunday? || Woman: I think so. I was worried about the distance, but I ran almost that far yesterday. || Man: Do you know where to collect your number? || Woman: Yes. [9]We have to pick it up from the sports hall on Saturday, because they won't give numbers out on race morning[/9]. Don't forget yours. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are you ready for the race on Sunday?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I think so. I was worried about the distance, but I ran almost that far yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Do you know where to collect your number?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes. We have to pick it up from the sports hall on Saturday, because they won't give numbers out on race morning. Don't forget yours. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: When must runners collect their race numbers?
questions.explanation: The woman says runners have to pick up numbers from the sports hall on Saturday.

extracts.context: You hear two people discussing a website for a club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you looked at the new website for the photography club? || Man: Yes. The photos look great, and the meeting dates are easy to find. || Woman: Anything missing? || Man: [10]There should be a clear map showing where the club meets, because new members may not know the school building[/10]. The contact form works well, though. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you looked at the new website for the photography club?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. The photos look great, and the meeting dates are easy to find.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: There should be a clear map showing where the club meets, because new members may not know the school building. The contact form works well, though. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What does the man think the website needs?

options.C: a map of the meeting place

questions.explanation: The man says the website should have a clear map showing where the club meets.

extracts.context: You hear a girl talking about a weekend course.
extracts.audio_script: Girl: I went on a first aid course at the weekend. I thought it would be mostly watching videos, but we had to practise a lot. || Boy: Was that embarrassing? || Girl: A little at first. [11]But practising on plastic models helped me remember what to do much better than just listening[/11]. The teacher also gave us a small book to take home. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I went on a first aid course at the weekend. I thought it would be mostly watching videos, but we had to practise a lot.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: A little at first. But practising on plastic models helped me remember what to do much better than just listening. The teacher also gave us a small book to take home. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What helped the girl learn most on the course?
questions.explanation: The girl says practising on plastic models helped her remember better than just listening.

extracts.context: You hear a man talking to his sister about a wedding.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you decided what to wear to Emma's wedding? || Man: Not completely. My blue suit still fits, but it feels too warm for July. I borrowed a grey one, but it looks old. || Woman: So what will you do? || Man: [12]I'll probably rent a light jacket for the day, because buying one for one event seems a waste[/12]. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you decided what to wear to Emma's wedding?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not completely. My blue suit still fits, but it feels too warm for July. I borrowed a grey one, but it looks old.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I'll probably rent a light jacket for the day, because buying one for one event seems a waste. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What will the man probably do?
questions.explanation: He says he will probably rent a light jacket because buying one for one event seems wasteful.

extracts.context: You hear an announcement at a community centre.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: Welcome to the community centre open day. The dance class demonstration will now be in Room Two, as the main hall is being cleaned after this morning's children's party. || Speaker: [13]Anyone interested in language classes should speak to Maria at the table by the entrance before three o'clock[/13]. The art display will remain open upstairs until five. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Welcome to the community centre open day. The dance class demonstration will now be in Room Two, as the main hall is being cleaned after this morning's children's party.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Anyone interested in language classes should speak to Maria at the table by the entrance before three o'clock. The art display will remain open upstairs until five. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

questions.question: What should people do if they want language classes?

options.A: go upstairs to the art display
options.C: talk to Maria by the entrance

questions.explanation: The announcement says people interested in language classes should speak to Maria at the table by the entrance.
